Curated For You

Signature Board

XL Board

Ideal for intimate boardroom meetings and small team gatherings. A beautifully curated spread of premium meats, cheeses, seasonal fruits, and artisan accompaniments.

Feeds 10–12 Guests
Statement Centrepiece

2ft Board + Bread Basket

A showstopping centrepiece for larger events and client entertainment. Paired with an artisan bread basket for a complete, elevated experience.

Feeds 35–40 Guests
Individual Portions

Charcuterie Boats

Elegant individual portions perfect for conferences, galas, and large-scale events. Available in gluten-free, vegan, and nut-free options. Minimum order of 10.

Min. Order of 10

Inclusive by Design

Every Guest, Considered

Our boards and boats are fully customizable to accommodate every dietary need at your table. We believe exceptional food should be inclusive — and beautiful for everyone.

The Difference

Why Choose Us

01

Locally Sourced from the Italian Centre

Every ingredient hand-selected from Edmonton's beloved Italian Centre — quality starts at the source.

02

Dietary restrictions, allergies, preferences — every board is built around your guests' needs.

03

Instagram-Worthy Presentation

Stunning, editorial-style boards that create a moment and leave a lasting impression on clients.

04

Edmonton-Based & Reliable

Local, dependable, and available for recurring corporate orders. We grow with your business.

05

Flexible for Any Headcount

From an intimate boardroom of 10 to a gala of 200 — we scale effortlessly.
